name: lung screening CT — Comparison section omitted

report.indication: Annual low-dose CT lung cancer screening.
report.technique: Low-dose non-contrast CT of the chest with 1 mm reconstructions.
report.findings: Lungs: 6 mm solid nodule in the right upper lobe, stable visually. No new nodules. No adenopathy. No pleural effusion.
report.impression:
1. Stable 6 mm right upper lobe solid nodule.
2. Lung-RADS 2.
